story_overview: Mr. Bean attempts to prepare a simple meal but his eccentric and clumsy nature turns the kitchen into a chaotic playground. He tries to make a sandwich but every step leads to a comedic disaster, involving a toaster that launches bread into the ceiling and a stubborn jar of peanut butter. The climax is a slapstick showdown with an overflowing blender. In the end, Mr. Bean hilariously gives up, opting for a simple biscuit, while his kitchen is left in complete disarray. The story is a visual comedy filled with classic Mr. Bean gags and physical humor, with minimal dialogue.
reconstruct_target: [Person A] middle-aged man with short brown hair wearing brown tweed jacket, white collared shirt, red tie, and dark trousers

video_prompts: global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with short brown hair wearing brown tweed jacket, white collared shirt, red tie, and dark trousers; shot caption: [Person A] enters a brightly lit kitchen, rubbing his hands together. He walks toward a counter with a loaf of bread and a butter knife, leaning over with hungry determination and pulling the bread closer with careful movements.

global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with short brown hair wearing brown tweed jacket, white collared shirt, red tie, and dark trousers; shot caption: [Person A] takes two slices of bread and places them into a shiny chrome toaster on the counter with exaggerated pride. He leans forward, his eyes fixed on the toaster slots, raising his eyebrows in eager anticipation.

global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with short brown hair wearing brown tweed jacket, white collared shirt, red tie, and dark trousers; shot caption: A shiny chrome two-slot toaster with two pale bread slices in the slots dings on the counter and launches the toast upward as [Person A] snaps his gaze toward the ceiling, crumbs scattering through the air.

global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with short brown hair wearing brown tweed jacket, white collared shirt, red tie, and dark trousers; shot caption: [Person A] stands beneath a white ceiling fan with two toast slices stuck across the blades, mouth open and arms raised. He hops repeatedly under the fan with awkward little jumps, but the toast stays out of reach.

global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with short brown hair wearing brown tweed jacket, white collared shirt, red tie, and dark trousers; shot caption: Abandoning the toast, [Person A] stands at the counter and grips a sealed peanut butter jar with a stubborn metal lid using both hands. He twists the lid with clenched teeth, hunched shoulders, and a reddening face.

global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with short brown hair wearing brown tweed jacket, white collared shirt, red tie, and dark trousers; shot caption: [Person A] holds a sealed peanut butter jar with a stubborn metal lid. He taps it with a spoon, flips the sealed peanut butter jar with a stubborn metal lid upside down, shakes it hard, and freezes with a rigid, frustrated stare.

global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with short brown hair wearing brown tweed jacket, white collared shirt, red tie, and dark trousers; shot caption: [Person A] twists the dial to the highest setting beside a clear blender jar on a white base. global caption: [Person A]: middle-aged man with short brown hair wearing brown tweed jacket, white collared shirt, red tie, and dark trousers; shot caption: [Person A] slips across banana-milk puddles while reaching toward the clear blender jar on a white base with sticky hands.
